name: Creamy Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked noodles (elbow, rotini, or small shells)
6 ounces Jar artichoke hearts (drained and sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the eggless mayonnaise and lemon juice into the noodles.
2. Add the green onions, artichoke hearts, basil, and salt to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. If the salad is too dry, add more mayonnaise and/or lemon juice.
